## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and AI-driven marketing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/HaweEwo5N7_BcEASDAcdFg_DEys8NAsC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is consistently producing 20-25 articles/week with new infographic elements](https://fathom.video/share/HaweEwo5N7_BcEASDAcdFg_DEys8NAsC?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Early traffic signals are positive for new AI roleplay content](https://fathom.video/share/HaweEwo5N7_BcEASDAcdFg_DEys8NAsC?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Exec is showing up in AI-generated content, validating the content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/HaweEwo5N7_BcEASDAcdFg_DEys8NAsC?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [New focus on leveraging Reddit for content ideas and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/HaweEwo5N7_BcEASDAcdFg_DEys8NAsC?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Quality

  - [Consistently producing 20-25 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/HaweEwo5N7_BcEASDAcdFg_DEys8NAsC?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [New infographic elements added to articles (e.g., 28 stats with custom graphics)](https://fathom.video/share/HaweEwo5N7_BcEASDAcdFg_DEys8NAsC?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Engineering team working on implementing imagery across all articles](https://fathom.video/share/HaweEwo5N7_BcEASDAcdFg_DEys8NAsC?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Early positive traffic signals on new pages (e.g., 42 impressions in 2-3 days)](https://fathom.video/share/HaweEwo5N7_BcEASDAcdFg_DEys8NAsC?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)

### SEO and Indexing Strategy

  - [Considering Bing Webmaster tools for potential ChatGPT connection](https://fathom.video/share/HaweEwo5N7_BcEASDAcdFg_DEys8NAsC?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Exploring ways to improve indexing speed](https://fathom.video/share/HaweEwo5N7_BcEASDAcdFg_DEys8NAsC?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Using Profound tool to monitor visibility in AI platforms](https://fathom.video/share/HaweEwo5N7_BcEASDAcdFg_DEys8NAsC?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

### Competitor Analysis and Content Ideas

  - [Plan to create content similar to Utili's top-performing pages](https://fathom.video/share/HaweEwo5N7_BcEASDAcdFg_DEys8NAsC?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Long-term SEO Value

  - [Discussion on the long-tail effect of good SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/HaweEwo5N7_BcEASDAcdFg_DEys8NAsC?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [Example: Sean's 10-year-old website still getting 3,000 clicks/month without updates](https://fathom.video/share/HaweEwo5N7_BcEASDAcdFg_DEys8NAsC?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
